title: Looking for a way to tie board items to locations on a site plan (new construction project)
excerpt: I’m working on a new commercial construction project that spans several acres. The site is not yet built, so it’s not well represented by current map systems. I’d like to visually represent the planned buildings on a sit…

posts.author: GingerS (Ginger Simoens)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m working on a new commercial construction project that spans several acres. The site is not yet built, so it’s not well represented by current map systems. I’d like to visually represent the planned buildings on a site plan and place pins or markers that tie back to specific lines/items on a board.

Ideally, I would overlay a site plan onto the map view and use the Lat/Lon Location column, but overlays aren’t currently supported.

Has anyone found a workaround or alternative tool to visually connect board items to locations on a custom site plan?

Appreciate any ideas—thanks in advance!
